description: In-app notifications with optional email delivery, per-user preferences, and archiving

stories.title: Database schema & domain entities
stories.description: Create migrations and domain models for notifications and preferences
acceptanceCriteria: migrations/000012_notifications.up.sql creates notifications table with archived_at, read_at, created_at, updated_at columns
notifications table has partial index idx_notifications_archived ON (user_id, archived_at) WHERE archived_at IS NULL
notification_preferences table has unique constraint on (user_id, notification_type)
internal/domain/notification.go defines NotificationType const and IsValidNotificationType() func
Notification struct has fields: ID, UserID, Type, Title, Message, ActionURL, ReadAt, ArchivedAt, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt
Notification has TableName(), ToResponse(), IsRead(), IsArchived(), MarkRead(), Archive() methods
internal/domain/notification_preference.go defines NotificationPreference struct with TableName(), ToResponse()
down migration (000012_notifications.down.sql) drops both tables cleanly
make migrate runs without errors and creates both tables

stories.title: Repository layer implementation
stories.description: Implement NotificationRepository and NotificationPreferenceRepository interfaces and implementations
acceptanceCriteria: internal/repository/notification.go defines NotificationRepository interface with 10 methods
NotificationRepository.FindByUserID filters archived_at IS NULL and returns paginated results
NotificationRepository.MarkAllAsRead accepts optional notifType *string parameter for type filtering
NotificationRepository.ArchiveByID updates archived_at instead of hard delete
All repository methods use context.Context as first parameter
internal/repository/notification_preference.go implements Upsert with INSERT ... ON CONFLICT
Both repositories use errors.WrapInternal() and errors.ErrNotFound for error handling
NotificationRepository implementation has NewNotificationRepository(db) constructor
Unit tests for soft delete filtering (archived notifications don't appear in Find results)

stories.title: Service layer with rate limiting & email integration
stories.description: Implement NotificationService with Send, SendBulk, MarkAsRead, MarkAllAsRead, and preference management
acceptanceCriteria: internal/service/notification.go defines NotificationService with 10 methods
Send() method validates notifType, checks rate limit (100/hour per user), creates notification
Send() method checks user preferences and queues email if EmailEnabled=true
Send() method uses default preferences (email enabled for system/assignment/mention, disabled for invoice/news)
Send() succeeds even if email queuing fails (email errors logged, not propagated)
SendBulk() creates notifications for multiple users and logs individual errors
MarkAllAsRead() accepts optional notifType parameter and filters by type if provided
Service constructor NewNotificationService(notifRepo, prefRepo, emailService, userRepo, cache)
Rate limiting uses Redis cache key notifications:user:{userID}:hourly with 1-hour TTL
Cache failures are logged but don't block notification creation (fail-open behavior)

stories.title: HTTP handler and request validation
stories.description: Implement NotificationHandler with 7 endpoints and request/response types
acceptanceCriteria: internal/http/request/notification.go defines UpdateNotificationPreferenceRequest with validator tags
internal/http/handler/notification.go defines NotificationHandler struct and NewNotificationHandler(service)
Handler.List (GET /api/v1/notifications) supports limit, offset, unread_only query params
Handler.CountUnread (GET /api/v1/notifications/unread-count) returns {unread_count: N}
Handler.MarkAsRead (PATCH /api/v1/notifications/:id/read) marks single notification as read
Handler.MarkAllAsRead (POST /api/v1/notifications/read-all) supports optional type query param
Handler.Archive (DELETE /api/v1/notifications/:id) archives notification via archived_at
Handler.GetPreferences (GET /api/v1/notifications/preferences) returns user's preferences
Handler.UpdatePreference (PUT /api/v1/notifications/preferences) creates/updates preferences
All handlers extract userID from JWT context (never client-supplied)
All handlers return response.Envelope format with proper error mapping via apperrors.GetAppError()

stories.title: Application wiring and permissions
stories.description: Wire routes, DI, and seed notification permissions
acceptanceCriteria: internal/http/server.go has RegisterNotificationRoutes() method following RegisterEmailRoutes pattern
RegisterNotificationRoutes() uses JWT middleware but NOT RequirePermission (ownership-based)
Route group applies audit middleware to all routes
RegisterRoutes() in server.go initializes notificationRepo, prefRepo, service, handler
cmd/api/main.go seeds permissions: notifications:view (own), notifications:manage (own)
Both permissions added to viewerPermissions and adminPermissions in seed data
tests/integration/testsuite.go includes notification tables in migration and cleanup
Server successfully starts with no DI errors
make seed runs and seeds notification permissions without errors

stories.title: Integration tests
stories.description: Write comprehensive integration tests covering all endpoints and edge cases
acceptanceCriteria: tests/integration/notification_handler_test.go exists with //go:build integration
TestNotificationHandler_List verifies pagination and unread_only filter
TestNotificationHandler_List verifies archived notifications are hidden
TestNotificationHandler_CountUnread correctly counts unread notifications
TestNotificationHandler_MarkAsRead sets read_at timestamp
TestNotificationHandler_MarkAllAsRead with optional type filter marks only specified type
TestNotificationHandler_Archive sets archived_at and hides from list
TestNotificationHandler_Preferences tests GET and PUT endpoints
Tests verify user cannot see/modify other users' notifications
Tests verify unauthenticated requests return 401
All integration tests pass: go test -tags=integration ./tests/integration/notification_handler_test.go
Rate limiting prevents 101st notification in same hour

stories.title: Swagger documentation and final verification
stories.description: Add Swagger annotations and regenerate documentation
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 handler methods have @Summary, @Description, @Tags, @Security, @Param annotations
All handlers have @Success and @Failure response annotations
swag init -g cmd/api/main.go -o docs/swagger succeeds without errors
docs/swagger/swagger.json includes /notifications endpoints
TypeScript compile check: go build ./cmd/api succeeds
All lsp_diagnostics on modified/new files show 0 errors
No breaking changes to existing services or routes
Success criteria verified: all endpoints respond with envelope format, user-scoped, read/unread tracking works, archiving works, rate limiting works, email integration works
